diabetes_confirmed.evidence: 5/5 pathways active with mild-to-moderate elevation, early molecular signs

diabetes_subtype.evidence: Early insulin resistance pattern with subclinical inflammation

findings.interpretation: Molecular evidence confirms early Type 2 diabetes despite normal clinical presentation. Subclinical pathway activation supports DNA-based hospital referral.

summary: Transcriptomics confirms early T2D: 5/5 pathways active at mild-moderate levels. Molecular validation supports early intervention despite negative clinical labs.
